headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -64.0)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 109% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 157 quotes and an exceptionally high share of strong-intensity posts (122 out of 157), driving the score to 80.4 — people are venting forcefully today.
• This frustration level sits in the upper half of the 167-day range (max 168.7), and has held virtually flat from yesterday's 79.7, signalling a sustained rather than sudden spike.
• Optimism jumped sharply from -52.1 yesterday to 5.7 today, though its 21 mild-intensity quotes temper the recovery — the mood lift is real but not deeply felt.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
